results.title: TeraWulf stock jumps on $19 billion Anthropic AI deal
results.description: The 20-year lease gives TeraWulf a long-term AI customer as investors look at the company’s data-center pivot.

results.title: Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III Shareholders Approve Business Combination with General Fusion
results.description: General Fusion expected to become the first publicly traded, pure-play fusion company

results.title: Hedge funds dumped chip stocks for fourth week as AI shares sold off
results.description: Hedge funds reduced exposure to semiconductor stocks for a fourth consecutive week as AI-related equities came under pressure. According to Reuters, managers continued cutting positions amid profit-taking and concerns over stretched valuations.... Article link
